untranslatable_reason: Diamond bottom pattern formation requires visual/shape recognition (pattern detection) which is not available in the indicator set. The signal requires identifying a specific diamond-shaped price pattern, height/width comparisons, and breakout day gap detection — these are chart pattern recognition features that cannot be expressed using only the available technical indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume, and bar properties).
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using downward close below pivot (breakout) and volume confirmation, but this does not capture the essential diamond pattern shape requirement. The signal's reliance on pattern geometry (tall vs short, wide vs narrow) and specific visual formation cannot be translated to available indicators without losing the core signal logic.
